en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Chinese Enterprise Production Permit in the Chinese Enterprise Safety Production Permit questionnaire.

The Chinese Enterprise Health and Safety Production Permit is an official license required for certain high-risk industries in China, mining, construction, hazardous chemicals, fireworks, and explosives manufacturing. The permit certifies that an enterprise meets national standards for workplace safety and health before beginning or continuing production.
